---
title: "test_debt_viz_empire.py"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/tests/empire_tests/test_debt_viz_empire.py"
loc: 25
complexity: 1
logic_score: 8.13
style_score: 3.98
intel_score: 4.60
overall_score: 5.93
---

## Intent
Python module facilitating test_debt_analyzer_files, test_debt_analyzer_logic. It exists to support broader Python integration routines. Its role in the system is to provide foundational utilities for script execution.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 8.1/10
- **Style [S]**: 4.0/10
- **Intel [I]**: 4.6/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 5 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [src.tools.debt_viz](file://src.tools.debt_viz)

### Exports
- `test_debt_analyzer_files`
- `test_debt_analyzer_logic`
